upload.title: Resume Analyzer
upload.subtitle: Upload your resume for instant AI-powered analysis

guidance.title: Before you start
guidance.description: Single-file upload is the fastest way to test a resume, refine a profile, or prepare a focused export.
guidance.step1Body: Use a PDF, DOC, or DOCX. Large or locked files can slow down analysis.
guidance.step2Body: Processing extracts text, detects sections, and prepares the improvement steps.
guidance.step3Body: You can then improve, compare, or export the resume from the dedicated screens.
guidance.tip: Tip: name files clearly for easier handling
